meta.title: WillChain — Blockchain Digital Will
meta.description: WillChain is an automated blockchain digital will. Your crypto assets will automatically transfer to your heir without lawyers or notaries.
meta.og_description: Your crypto assets will automatically transfer to your heir. No lawyers. No bureaucracy. Forever on the blockchain.

hero.title: When You're Gone, Your Assets Go to Your Designated Heir
hero.subtitle: Every year, thousands of people die without leaving a successor for their cryptocurrency. Their families know the money exists but can't access it. WillChain solves this automatically.

problem.label: The Problem
problem.title: What Happens to Your Cryptocurrency After You Pass?
problem.subtitle: Most people don't think about it until it's too late.
problem.card1_desc: If you're the only one with the private key, your funds disappear forever when you're gone. No court or notary can help here.
problem.card2_desc: Billions of dollars in cryptocurrency lie untouched in abandoned wallets. Their owners are gone, and the funds are locked forever – inaccessible to anyone.
problem.card3_desc: Even if they know the funds exist, without the key or password, family can't access them. It's a legal dead end.

recycle.hint: If the wallet owner has completely disappeared (no activity beyond the set period + 60 days) and hasn't designated an heir – anyone can initiate fund recycling and receive 1% as a reward.
recycle.status_inactive: Inactive – Not Yet Abandoned (Total timeout not expired)

timeline.title: How Events Unfold
timeline.active_desc: Timer is running. Any transaction resets it.
timeline.grace_desc: A buffer after inactivity. You can still confirm presence.
timeline.claimable_desc: Heir submits a claim. Owner has a window to cancel.

how_it_works.label: 4 Steps
how_it_works.subtitle: Four simple steps – and your crypto is protected
how_it_works.title: How It Works
how_it_works.step1_desc: Buy WILL tokens on an exchange or receive them from another holder. Your digital will becomes active as soon as you hold any amount of WILL.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Specify the wallet address of the person who should receive your funds after your prolonged inactivity or death. This could be a spouse, child, friend – anyone you care about.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Any outgoing transaction automatically confirms your activity. If the wallet hasn't been used in a while, click 'I'm Here!' manually.
how_it_works.step4_desc: Set how long without activity the WillChain mechanism should trigger: 30, 90, 180, or 365 days. This is followed by a 30-day grace period and 30 days for the heir.

trust.label: Why You Can Trust Us
trust.noncustodial_desc: No one but your heir will access your funds

faq.label: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Do I need to log in daily?
faq.a1: No. If you regularly use your crypto wallet, the timer resets automatically. The 'I'm Here!' button is only needed if your wallet is completely inactive.
faq.a2: 30, 90, 180, or 365 days. You can change this anytime. Those who trade frequently choose 30 days, while long-term investors opt for 365.
faq.q3: What happens if the period expires?
faq.a3: A 30-day grace period begins – you can still confirm your presence. Then, the heir has 30 days to initiate a claim. If no heir is appointed or they don't claim in time, funds are recycled: 47% is burned, 47% is distributed to WILL holders, 5% goes to the protocol, and 1% to the initiator.
faq.q4: Can someone change my heir without my knowledge?
faq.a4: No. Only you, with your private key, can change the heir. The contract guarantees this.
faq.q5: Does anyone see my personal data?
faq.a5: No. Only your wallet address, balance, and activity timestamps are stored on the blockchain. No names or personal information.
faq.q6: Where is the smart contract located?
faq.a6: Deployed on the Base Sepolia testnet. The source code is open and verified on Basescan.
faq.q7: Does the auto-reset timer work with multi-sig wallets?
faq.a7: If you use a standard wallet (MetaMask, Trust Wallet), the timer resets with any transfer. However, if you use Smart Wallets or Multisig (e.g., Safe), where a relayer executes transactions, you'll need to manually confirm your activity via the website.
faq.q8: Can approving a DEX or dApp affect my inheritance?
faq.a8: No. Token approvals (allowances) do not affect your inheritance timer. Only direct actions by you — transfers, confirmActivity, or vault setup — count as proof of liveness. A third-party spender using transferFrom() cannot reset your timer. Your inheritance will proceed normally even if you have active DEX approvals.

disclaimer.title: Legal Information
disclaimer.modal_subtitle: Please read carefully before connecting your wallet
disclaimer.s1_text: The WILL token is a utility token solely for managing digital inheritance within WillChain. Holding the token does not grant rights to profits, company shares, or any rights associated with securities.
disclaimer.s2_text: The token burning mechanism is a technical tool to clear the network of inactive participants, not a promise of market value appreciation. We do not guarantee liquidity or future asset prices.
disclaimer.s3_text: The user is fully responsible for maintaining activity or performing manual confirmations before the set period expires. Loss of access to private keys or missing the deadline will lead to irreversible loss of access to funds.
disclaimer.s4_text: The protocol is deployed on Base (Ethereum L2). You agree to the risks associated with smart contract vulnerabilities or blockchain network updates. This is experimental software – use at your own risk.
disclaimer.s5_text: The user is obliged to independently verify that their use of WillChain does not violate the laws of their jurisdiction.
disclaimer.checkbox: I have read and accept the terms. I understand that I am fully responsible for my activity and potential loss of assets.

tiers.title: Vault Tier
tiers.subtitle: Your tier is determined by the amount of WILL

transfer_modal.title: Send WILL
transfer_modal.subtitle: Sending automatically confirms your activity
transfer_modal.activity_reset_hint: Sending WILL directly resets your activity timer. DEX swaps via allowance do not — use confirmActivity() to prove liveness.

security.allowance_text: Only your direct actions count as proof of liveness: token transfers you send, activity confirmation, or vault setup. DEX swaps via token approvals do not reset your timer. If you trade on DEXes, remember to confirm your activity separately.
